architecturePrinciples: Ecosystem-first: shared types, one JSON SoT, optional Supabase overlay — never fork parallel roadmap trackers.
Realtime-first where the product promises live state; degrade with explicit UX, not silent stubs.
Cloud SoT for data that must be authoritative across devices; repository JSON for editorial readiness until CI writes snapshots.
Modular boundaries: AION Driver is one client module; portal and Core/Link stay decoupled from driver-only hacks.
aiExecutionNotes.noFakeDoneRule: Never mark fully_done without releaseQualityBar + definitionOfDone in JSON and verified production paths.
aiExecutionNotes.finishBeforeSwitchingRule: Complete the current subsystem or epic slice before switching unless the user explicitly rescopes.
aiExecutionNotes.noPlaceholderUx: No TODO shells in user-visible flows; ship disabled states with copy or hide behind feature flags.
aiExecutionNotes.noDisconnectedSystems: UI must call real modules/services; no orphan screens without data contract.
aiExecutionNotes.noDuplicateLogic: Extend existing helpers/repos; do not copy-paste second parsers or merge trees.
aiExecutionNotes.ecosystemFirstArchitecture: Prefer changes that improve cohesion: shared env, typed payloads, one merge path in ecosystem-data.
aiExecutionNotes.cloudSourceOfTruthPolicy: When Supabase snapshots exist (portal_ecosystem, portal_roadmap_master), they overlay repo JSON; document conflicts instead of guessing.
aiExecutionNotes.realtimeFirstDirection: Favor durable channels, backoff, and observable health for sync/realtime; measure before claiming readiness %.
releaseQualityRequirements: Manual acceptance on primary flows before production channel bumps.
Known P0/P1 must have owner + date or remain blocked in execution queue.
OTA vs APK policy respected: native bumps only via APK when requiresApk applies.

chatgpt: Architecture and tradeoffs: review subsystem boundaries, risk, and sequencing.
Strategy: reconcile epics with execution queue and cloud constraints.
Ecosystem review: challenge fake completeness and suggest consolidation.
cursor: Implementation: code against roadmap-execution + ecosystem-status SoT.
Integration: wire APIs, merge JSON, tests, and portal surfaces.
Refactor: remove duplication while preserving behavior contracts.

trustedFullyDoneRequires: Реализовано в коде и проверено вручную на основных потоках
Отражено в ecosystem-implementation-feed.json (событие) или явно отмечено почему нет
Нет открытых P0/P1 по подсистеме без плана в executionQueue
Валидация: web_build passed для изменений портала; для client — согласованный gate в репо клиента
collaborationWorkflow: 2) Cursor выбирает задачу по executionQueue и nextRecommendedStep подсистемы.
3) При неясной архитектуре — запрос к ChatGPT с приложенными JSON срезами.
4) После merge: npm run feed:append (или правка ecosystem-implementation-feed.json) + обновление lastUpdated в ecosystem-status при смене readiness.
5) ChatGPT сверяет против trustedFullyDoneRequires перед тем как согласовать «done».
